summary: Chlorhexidine mouthwash effectively reduces Streptococcus mutans levels significantly within two weeks; however, long-term continuous usage may reduce effectiveness due to potential bacterial resistance development after discontinuation. The most beneficial application period appears shortly after initiation before such adaptations occur. To maximize benefits while minimizing risks associated with sustained treatment impacts, it’s recommended focusing intense but brief courses targeting immediate needs without extending beyond necessary durations unless medically indicated otherwise based individual patient circumstances or evolving conditions necessitating further intervention steps tailored specifically towards each
